description: Led a team of 6 ML engineers to design and deploy a production-scale LLM inference pipeline serving 50M+ daily requests.
Reduced model latency by 38% through mixed-precision quantisation and kernel fusion techniques.
Architected a multi-GPU distributed training framework using JAX, cutting training time from 14 days to 4 days.
Mentored 3 junior engineers and established quarterly internal research presentations.
Implemented RLHF fine-tuning pipelines for GPT-3 variants, improving alignment scores by 22%.
Contributed to internal evaluation harness used across 4 research teams.

Projects.title: LocalLLM WebGPU
Projects.description: Browser-based LLM acceleration engine running 7B-parameter models entirely client-side using WebGPU compute shaders.

Projects.title: DistributedGrad
Projects.description: An open-source library for gradient compression in distributed deep learning, reducing communication overhead by 60%.
